cover_letter:
My passion for enhancing developer workflows and my experience building impactful developer tools makes the Software Engineer role for Anthropic's Claude Code team a truly exciting prospect. The idea of a terminal-based AI coding assistant resonates strongly with my commitment to improving developer productivity.

At InnovateTech Solutions, I led the development of a new internal developer platform using **Node.js, TypeScript, and React**, directly translating into a **25% improvement in developer productivity**. This experience, alongside my work with **Python/Django** at WebWorks Corp, reflects a strong background in shipping production software and a keen eye for user experience in technical tools.

While my direct experience with LLMs at the API layer is nascent, my proven ability to design and implement robust REST APIs for microservices and integrate complex third-party APIs positions me well to quickly ramp up. I'm adept at collaborating cross-functionally, having partnered with product managers and UX designers to translate requirements into user-centric features and iterate fast on real user feedback—a skill I believe is crucial for shaping model capabilities directly with researchers.

I am confident my background in impactful full-stack development and my enthusiasm for generative AI align perfectly with Anthropic's vision for Claude Code. I welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute.
job_description:
Software Engineer — Anthropic, San Francisco

We're hiring a software engineer to help build Claude Code, our
terminal-based AI coding assistant.

You'll:
- Design and ship features in TypeScript and Python
- Work directly with model researchers to shape model capabilities
- Iterate fast on real user feedback

We're looking for:
- 3+ years building production software
- Strong opinions about developer tools and UX
- Comfort working with LLMs at the API layer
- Bonus: experience with terminal applications, Node.js, or React

cover_letter:
To whom it may concern,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Software Engineer position at your esteemed company. I believe I would be a great fit for this role due to my passion for technology and innovation.

With several years of experience in software development, I have honed my skills in various programming languages and frameworks. I am a self-starter who works well both independently and as part of a team. My strong communication skills and attention to detail make me a valuable asset to any organization.

I am particularly drawn to your company's mission and would welcome the opportunity to contribute to your continued success. I am confident that my skills and experience align well with your needs and that I could make meaningful contributions from day one.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,
A Candidate
